hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */tech/index.html|*/tech/index_en.html) node "$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tech/check-i18n-drift.mjs" 1>&2 || echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠ JP/EN portfolio drift — run: node tech/check-i18n-drift.mjs"}' ;; esac
